subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thank you for following up from Vendor Inc. I'd be glad to arrange a formal meeting to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

I'm available at the following times next week:
- April 21, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- April 22, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- April 23, 2026 at 14:00–16:00

Regarding your request for direct contact details of our senior leadership, I'm unable to share internal contact information. Please refer to our public website for official contact channels.

Please confirm which slot works for you, and I'll coordinate the meeting invitation.

Thanks,
